name: Pork Chop Casserole
recipeIngredient: 5 large potatoes, cut as for French fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork chops in the bottom of a large casserole dish.
2. Arrange the remaining ingredients on top of the pork chops.
3. Pour the tomato sauce over the top.
4. Fill any empty cans with water and pour the water into the dish as well.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
6. Increase the temperature to 400°F and bake for another 30 minutes, or until a fork easily pierces the meat and potatoes.
